title: Coregentis Governance Record
description: Cross-cutting governance record for Coregentis runtime objects. Carries inspectable references to policy, confirm, authority, and control-state without implementing policy logic itself.

governance_scope.description: Primary governance scope over which this object's controls apply.

locked.description: Whether the object is currently governance-locked.

review_required.description: Whether a governance review is explicitly required before progression.

approval_state.description: Current approval/control state associated with this object.

policy_refs.description: Policy object identifiers or external policy references associated with this object.

authority_refs.description: Authority-binding references associated with this object.

confirm_refs.description: Confirm-gate or approval references associated with this object.
